title: kyllinga alba subsp. nigritana
intro: Kyllinga alba subsp. nigritana, also known as Black Kyllinga or Nigritana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Kyllinga alba subsp. nigritana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
